meta.title: Acclaimed Iranian-American Author Shares Insights on the Immigrant Experience
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Thomas Duesterberg for a conversation with Iranian dissident immigrant Roya Hakakian on her new book “A Beginners Guide to America: for the Immigrant and the Curious.” The book provides insights into the immigrant experience from the perspective of a political refugee from revolutionary Iran, and an examination of how immigrants contribute to American culture and civic life.
